creator: yuryd2006@gmail.com
text:
IBM server x3550 2*Xeon E5405, 4G RAM ,amd64, bce BCM5708C(internal) or BCM5708(pci-e) hang system with coredump without any network load, or run iperf..
Like kern/155004 

Fatal trap 12: page fault while in kernel mode
cpuid = 2; apic id = 00
fault virtual address   = 0x18
fault code              = supervisor read data, page not present
instruction pointer     = 0x8:0xffffffff805ea9c6
stack pointer           = 0x10:0xffffff80754f9080
frame pointer           = 0x10:0x0
code segment            = base 0x0, limit 0xfffff, type 0x1b
                        = DPL 0, pres 1, long 1, def32 0, gran 1
processor eflags        = interrupt enabled, resume, IOPL = 0
current process         = 43 (irq259: bce3)
trap number             = 12
panic: page fault
cpuid = 2
Uptime: 4m53s

How-To-Repeat:  run iperf on bce
